note.title: 😈 Morpheus Blend
note.desc:
1️⃣ Hacienda La Esmeralda El Velo Guabo 5BANC Geisha Natural (5.6 grams)
Tasting Notes: Purple Grape, Grapefruit, Mango Juice, Cherry, Pineapple Candy
	
2️⃣ Mount Totumas Geisha Natural (5.6 grams)
Tasting Notes: Peach, Honeysuckle, White Tea, Lemon Soda, Violet
	
3️⃣ Alo Main Station Tri-Up Customized Lot 74158 Yeast Natural (4.8g)
Tasting Notes: Violet, Pineapple, Black Plum, Tropical Fruit, Juicy
	
4️⃣ Inmaculada Eugenioides Natural (0.8g)
Tasting Notes: Guava, Strawberry, Monkfruit, Stevia Sweetness, Chocolate
	
-
	
⏳ Origami | 📄 Origami 185 | ⚙️ C40 #24[话题]# | 🌡️ 93°C | 🪨 60ppm | 🫘 16g | 💧 60🔄🌪️/140🔄/60🔄📍🌪️ | ⏰ 2m10s
	
-

note.body:
1️⃣ Hacienda La Esmeralda El Velo Guabo 5BANC Geisha Natural (5.6 grams)
Tasting Notes: Purple Grape, Grapefruit, Mango Juice, Cherry, Pineapple Candy
	
2️⃣ Mount Totumas Geisha Natural (5.6 grams)
Tasting Notes: Peach, Honeysuckle, White Tea, Lemon Soda, Violet
	
3️⃣ Alo Main Station Tri-Up Customized Lot 74158 Yeast Natural (4.8g)
Tasting Notes: Violet, Pineapple, Black Plum, Tropical Fruit, Juicy
	
4️⃣ Inmaculada Eugenioides Natural (0.8g)
Tasting Notes: Guava, Strawberry, Monkfruit, Stevia Sweetness, Chocolate
	
-
	
⏳ Origami | 📄 Origami 185 | ⚙️ C40  | 🌡️ 93°C | 🪨 60ppm | 🫘 16g | 💧 60🔄🌪️/140🔄/60🔄📍🌪️ | ⏰ 2m10s
	
-

comments.content:
【冲煮方案】
水质：怡宝+Apax+TWW 60ppm
滤杯：v60
滤纸：Origami漂白
研磨度：C40 23# 中度研磨
粉水比：1:16.6

【冲煮参数】
16g粉，265g注水，约2:10撤杯
0:00-0:06：60g/93°C，绕圈注水，闷蒸，摇晃
0:30-1:03：200g(+140g)/93°C，缓慢绕圈注水，打开壶盖降温
1:18-1:23：265g(+65g)/93°C，扫粉后中心注水，摇晃

subComments.content: 哈哈可能你的方案更好[大笑R]
